original_image_tags: The page is a dark, likely black-and-white, scan of a typed document. The text is positioned at the top. The word "CONFIDENTIAL" is stamped at the top and again at the bottom, with the bottom stamp partially obscured and underlined. There are two punched holes visible on the left edge. Faint, illegible text appears to be visible from the reverse side of the page or from bleed-through. A handwritten number "167" is in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: Typed document page with 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamp at top and bottom. Text describes an event on 30 June 1947 involving a P-80 pilot sighting over Grand Canyon, Arizona. Includes agent's notes and address details. Page has hole punches on the left margin.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the page being a typed document with 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps at top and bottom, punched holes on the left, and no actual photographs or diagrams present.
